notes: Investment pages redesign: /investment dashboard (model-status strip w/ honest holdout metrics, top-picks preview w/ max buy, 12-month retirement radar, pattern charts), /investment/top-picks deal sheet (max buy green/amber, tier, rationale chips, filters), /investment/sets browser, sidebar Dashboard/Top Picks/All Sets.
